headline: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
summary: Swift Observatory, launched in 2004, faces re-entry due to recent solar storms. NASA initiated an emergency mission to save the satellite. Katalyst Space Technologies' Link spacecraft launched to boost its orbit.

headline: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
summary: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted ~6,000 pages on energy conservation. This occurred amidst a historic heatwave across the country. The deletion followed Republican outrage over an AC temperature recommendation.

headline: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
summary: Matic's popular robot vacuum will increase its price by $250. The cost will rise from $1,245 to $1,495 on September 9th. Consumers are advised to purchase before this date to avoid the price hike.

headline: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
summary: Erick the Architect, producer for Flatbush Zombies, discussed his varied career. He reminisced about the physical keyboard of his old BlackBerry phone. The article highlights his unique preferences amidst his musical journey.

headline: Solo Leveling: Beyond the System Movie Announced at Anime Expo
summary: The popular anime series "Solo Leveling" is getting a full-length movie adaptation. Titled "Solo Leveling: Beyond the System," it will continue the story after two seasons. The announcement was made during Anime Expo.

headline: Young Washington Review
summary: "Young Washington" explores the early life of the first US President. The review notes its earnest but limited grasp of the grand vision. It offers a storybook interpretation but lacks a fully nuanced chronicle.

headline: First Look at Ghost of Tsushima Legends Anime Character Art
summary: A first look at anime character art for "Ghost of Tsushima Legends" has been unveiled. This art provides a new visual interpretation for the game's multiplayer mode. Fans can anticipate an exciting new aesthetic.

headline: The Best Deals Today: Cyberpunk 2077, Criterion Collection Sale, Nintendo Switch 2 Camera, and More
summary: Today's best deals include discounts on "Cyberpunk 2077." The Criterion Collection sale is also highlighted. Other featured deals involve the Nintendo Switch 2 Camera and various products.

headline: Police leadership needs 'ethical reset', Lord Blunkett tells BBC
summary: Former home secretary Lord Blunkett called for an 'ethical reset' in police leadership. He co-authored a major report recommending a fundamental overhaul of forces. The report addresses police operations across England and Wales.

headline: Prince Harry will not be joined by Meghan and children on London trip
summary: Prince Harry will travel to London without Meghan and their children. The change follows a decision regarding taxpayer-funded security. The family will not receive official security for this visit.

headline: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
summary: Ukraine targeted a significant oil terminal in Russia's St. Petersburg. President Zelensky stated the goal is to hit key infrastructure generating war revenue. This strike aims to impact Russia's financial resources for conflict.

headline: Pubs and police brace for England-Mexico 1am kick-off after Fifa U-turn
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match will kick off at 01:00 BST on Monday. This late time is due to a Fifa U-turn on rescheduling. Pubs and police are preparing for the unusual late-night event.
